ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., regular, foreclosure) */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sale (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the sale occurred */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the sale occurred */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the seller */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the sale */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount earned by the agent */,
  "appraisal_value" REAL /* Appraised value of the property at the time of sale */,
  "inspected_by" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Detailed inspection report */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., conventional, FHA) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Total closing costs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager (for hierarchical management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "school_quality" TEXT /* Quality of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* Average property value in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transportation_access" TEXT /* Access to public transportation (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks in the neighborhood */,
  "grocery_stores" INTEGER /* Number of grocery stores in the neighborhood */,
  "schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning classification */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code (e.g., RL, RH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning classification */,
  "minimum_lot_size" INTEGER /* Minimum lot size in square feet */,
  "maximum_building_height" INTEGER /* Maximum building height in feet */,
  "setback_requirements" TEXT /* Setback requirements from property lines */,
  "allowed_uses" TEXT /* Allowed uses for the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "building_type_code" TEXT /* Building type code (e.g., 1Fam for single-family homes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  "average_square_footage" INTEGER /* Average square footage for the building type */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value for the building type */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the building type in the market */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the building type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "house_styles" (
  "house_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house style */,
  "house_style_code" TEXT /* House style code (e.g., 1Story for one-story homes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the house style */,
  "average_square_footage" INTEGER /* Average square footage for the house style */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value for the house style */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the house style in the market */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the house style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property condition */,
  "condition_code" TEXT /* Condition code (e.g., Norm for normal condition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property condition */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property condition */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Estimated maintenance cost */,
  "repair_cost" REAL /* Estimated repair cost */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the condition before major repairs are needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
